subject: Quarterly bloodwork results are available
body_preview: Your laboratory results from January 12 have been posted to the patient portal for Dr. Tierney's review.

subject: Appointment reminder: Dr. Tierney, January 12
body_preview: This is a reminder of your quarterly visit with Dr. Joan Tierney on Monday, January 12 at 9:40 in the morning.

subject: Fasting bloodwork before your next visit
body_preview: Please complete your quarterly bloodwork at the lab before your next appointment. Fasting is required for the panel.

subject: Re: bloodwork before your appointment
body_preview: Thank you. I will come in for the draw on Friday morning, fasting as instructed.

subject: New note from Dr. Tierney on the portal
body_preview: Dr. Tierney has posted a new note. Continue your current medication and recheck inflammation markers in three months.

subject: Appointment confirmed: quarterly visit
body_preview: Your next quarterly visit with Dr. Tierney is confirmed for the morning of October 12. Please arrive fifteen minutes early.

subject: Quarterly bloodwork reminder
body_preview: A reminder that your quarterly bloodwork is due. Please schedule your fasting draw at the Providence lab before your visit.

subject: Bloodwork results posted
body_preview: Your laboratory results from October 9 have been posted to the patient portal for Dr. Tierney's review.

subject: Portal message: refill approved
body_preview: Dr. Tierney has approved your prescription refill request. The order has been sent to your pharmacy.

subject: Appointment reminder: Dr. Tierney, October 12
body_preview: This is a reminder of your visit with Dr. Joan Tierney on Monday, October 12 at 9:40 in the morning.

subject: Re: portal note from Dr. Tierney
body_preview: Thank you for the update. I will keep to the schedule and come in for the next draw before my October visit.
